mpicxx  -std=c++11 -rdynamic CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/CafeParsing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/Cafe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/CellularAutomataSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/Simulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/CafeEnv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/CafeSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/CellularAutomataManager_3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/CellularAutomataManager_2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/CellularAutomataManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/Envelope.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/Grain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/Octahedron.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/Orientation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/ParallelCommManager_2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/ParallelCommManager_3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/ParallelCommManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/ProblemPhysics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/Timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/VtrManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/VtuManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/Solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/Node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/MapVoxelManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/LoadDataFromFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/FiniteElementMethodSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/FiniteElementManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/Element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/VtkManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/CafeMacro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AMCA3D.dir/CA/src/CellularAutomataManager_3DRemelting.cpp.o -o AMCA3D   -L/home/stan/YAML/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/stan/YAML/lib:/home/stan/BOOST/lib /home/stan/BOOST/lib/libboost_system.so /home/stan/BOOST/lib/libboost_filesystem.so /home/stan/BOOST/lib/libboost_program_options.so -lyaml-cpp -lpthread
